title: Clean beneficiary change intake
summary: Well-formed intake that should pass extraction, validation, and payload transformation cleanly.

title: Messy but recoverable document request
summary: Abbreviated, inconsistent operator text that should still normalize into a valid legacy submission.

title: Missing required account details
summary: Operator note is understandable but lacks the identifiers required for a deterministic legacy handoff.

title: Conflicting request details require review
summary: Conflicting workflow and account references should trigger a controlled review path instead of an automated submission.
